creator: barzog@telecom.by
text:
Stefan Walter Ð¿Ð¸ÑÐµÑ:
>> Can you please let us know the steps to reproduce the error? Did you
>> installed compat4x, compat5x, and localedata dependencies before
>> installing hpacucli?
>>     
Installed:
compat4x-i386-5.3_9
compat5x-amd64-5.4.0.8_9
localedata-5.4
Needed options presend in kernel config file:
options COMPAT_43 # Needed by COMPAT_LINUX32
options COMPAT_IA32 # Compatible with i386 binaries
options COMPAT_FREEBSD4 # Compatible with FreeBSD4
options COMPAT_FREEBSD5 # Compatible with FreeBSD5
options COMPAT_FREEBSD6

I've reinstalled it, nothing changes:

root@stork:/usr/ports$sudo portupgrade -f compat4x-i386
